title: Top Materials Gathered
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM MaterialCollected WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} materials gathered in total during the report period. Your top individual materials are a map of where you've been spending time — certain materials only come from specific sources like wake scanning, combat, or particular planet compositions, so the list tells the story of your activities.
details.help: MaterialCollected Name_Localised is the display name. total drives the title as the overall volume headline.

tagLines: Material inventory acquisition log compiled. Top gathered materials by unit volume noted.
The rarest materials are always at the bottom of the chart. The grind for them shows somewhere else.
Whatever you gathered most is what you needed most. The inventory doesn't lie about your priorities.
